ops.text: PostToolUse commit-landed hook misattributed a durable-doc extraction: after a ccx vcs ship run in ~/Code/cc-skills (prose-only commit b3d51ae touching plugin/guides/md/claude-rules.md), the nudge asked for a doc_add about hostGOOS seam overrides in internal/cli — content from an unrelated cc-notes commit, presumably because the shell cwd had reset to ~/Code/cc-notes. The doc-extraction should key off the repo the commit landed in, not the session cwd.
